title: DiscoveryAgentOutput
description: Standard output envelope for discovery agents (security, performance, cloud, k8s, db, hardware, network, software). Each observation is a precise FACTUAL statement about discovered system functionality. Observations MUST cite evidence_ids. There is deliberately NO severity, score, or recommendation — AuditCore describes what exists and how it works, it does not judge or prescribe.

topic.description: short label, e.g. 'SSH authentication', 'NUMA layout', 'IAM trust policy'

summary.description: one-line factual statement of what was found

detail.description: exhaustive, precise description of the functionality: exact values, versions, configuration, behavior, and how the pieces interconnect

facts.description: structured key/value extraction of the precise facts (ports, versions, flags, counts, identifiers)

related_asset_ids.description: other assets this functionality interacts with

coverage_notes.description: where the agent looked but found no data, or where additional collection would reveal more functionality
